videos.headline: Will Howard finds Jeremiah Smith for incredible 70-yard OSU TD reception
videos.description: Ohio State QB Will Howard finds Jeremiah Smith who scores an incredible 70-yard touchdown vs. Western Michigan.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Will Howard finds Jeremiah Smith for incredible 70-yard OSU TD reception) 2024/09/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Treveyon Henderson's rushing TD puts Ohio State on the board
videos.description: Treveyon Henderson punches in a 3-yard rushing touchdown to open the scoring for Ohio State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Treveyon Henderson's rushing TD puts Ohio State on the board) 2024/09/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Quinshon Judkins runs in OSU TD
videos.description: Quinshon Judkins evades a tackle as he runs in a touchdown to extend Ohio State's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Quinshon Judkins runs in OSU TD) 2024/09/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Will Howard stiff-arms defender to run in OSU TD
videos.description: Ohio State quarterback Will Howard stiff-arms a defender as he runs in a touchdown to further extend Ohio State's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Will Howard stiff-arms defender to run in OSU TD) 2024/09/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Treveyon Henderson runs in 2nd TD for OSU
videos.description: Treveyon Henderson runs in his second touchdown of the game to pad Ohio State's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Treveyon Henderson runs in 2nd TD for OSU) 2024/09/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: James Peoples runs in TD for OSU
videos.description: James Peoples gets in on the fun by running in a 12-yard touchdown for Ohio State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (James Peoples runs in TD for OSU) 2024/09/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Julian Sayin finds Bennett Christian for OSU TD
videos.description: Julian Sayin makes a nice pass to Bennett Christian who runs in the 55-yard touchdown for Ohio State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Julian Sayin finds Bennett Christian for OSU TD) 2024/09/07 ESHEET
